name: busabase
description: Approval-first knowledge base for AI — propose changes as ChangeRequests, a human reviews, only approved changes merge.

interface.longDescription: Propose changes as ChangeRequests, a human reviews them, and only approved changes merge into canonical data. Drive Bases, records, and the review queue over HTTP.
defaultPrompt: Show my Busabase change requests awaiting review.
Propose a new record in my Busabase content pipeline.
